calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Western Mart Co., a California General Partnership dba San Francisco Mart.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Shamrock Furniture Sales, Inc. a Nevada Corporation.
Principal of $36,998.45
Prejudgment Interest $1,662.96
Attorney's fees of $1,530.00
Costs of $429.50
For the total of $40,620.91
Judgment signed in open court.
